summary: Performance analytics coaching refined with box-based guidance, improved upload responsiveness, and release stability updates.
release_notes: Removed the step-by-step coaching wizard and restored a cleaner box-based coaching recap with separate panels for strengths, issues, and next-session plan.
Coaching now surfaces clearer good-vs-bad diagnostics and converts top weaknesses into direct, actionable next steps.
Improved analytics upload interaction responsiveness by reducing temporary input blocking windows and removing friction in click handling.
Updated performance analytics UI and behavior for more readable insights and smoother day-to-day review workflow.
General reliability and packaging hardening updates carried forward for desktop release consistency.
